title: Which Real Estate Sectors Are The Best Right Now?
text: We look for areas in which fundamentals and pricing do not match up. Subsectors are significantly mispriced right now.

title: Why Welltower Stock Did Smashingly Well Today
text: The company reported encouraging quarterly results and announced a fresh new deal.

title: Welltower Inc. (WELL) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Welltower Inc. (NYSE:WELL ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call November 8, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Matt McQueen - General Counsel Shankh Mitra - CEO John Burkart - COO Tim McHugh - CFO Nikhil Chaudhri - Co-Head of U.S. Investments Conference Call Participants Vikram Malhotra - Mizuho Securities Derek Johnston - Deutsche Bank John Pawlowski - Green Street Wendy Ma - Evercore Daniel Bernstein - Capital One Securities Ronald Kamdem - Morgan Stanley Michael Carroll - RBC Capital Markets Tayo Okusanya - Credit Suisse Michael Mueller - JPMorgan Nicholas Yulico - Scotiabank Austin Wurschmidt - KeyBanc Capital Markets Juan Sanabria - BMO Capital Markets Richard Anderson - SMBC Nick Joseph - Citi Steven Valiquette - Barclays David Rodgers - Baird Joshua Dennerlein - BofA Securities Operator Hello. My name is Lisa, and I'll be your conference operator today.

title: Welltower (WELL) Q3 FFO Meets, Revenues Top, Same-Store NOI Up
text: Welltower (WELL) reports healthy Q3 results, with the top line growing year over year. The SHO portfolio witnesses improvement in occupancy.

title: Welltower (WELL) Matches Q3 FFO Estimates
text: Welltower (WELL) delivered FFO and revenue surprises of 0% and 1.11%, respectively, for the quarter ended September 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: What's in Store for Welltower (WELL) This Earnings Season?
text: Positive operating trends in the SHO portfolio are likely to have aided Welltower's (WELL) Q3 earnings. However, a delay in the disbursements of HHS funds and interest rate hikes might have been deterrents.
